name: French Toasted Ham & Cheese
recipeIngredient: 1 loaf of party rye bread (8 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, stir the orange marmalade and dry mustard until well mixed. Set aside.
2. Cut each ham slice to fit half of a bread slice. Place a slice of ham on one piece of bread, then top with a slice of Swiss cheese. Add a dollop of the marmalade mixture and another bread slice.
3. Preheat the oven to 450°F.
4. In a jellyroll pan, melt butter or margarine using a torching method.
5. Remove the pan from the oven and place it back in.
6. In a pie plate, beat the milk and egg together with a fork until well mixed.
7. Dip each sandwich, one at a time, into the egg mixture to coat all sides.
8. Place the sandwiches in a single layer on the prepared jellyroll pan.
9. Bake for about 20 minutes, turning once, until the sandwiches are golden brown on both sides.
10. Cut each sandwich in half.
11. Serve hot.
